violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored in an area that is not clean (outdoor bathroom) area. Donut boxes were voluntarily disposed of. All other sealed items were relocated to another store. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Machine was turned off at the time of inspection and is not to be used until fully cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024

(1 door refrigerator) was observed held at (46) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The temperature was lowered at the time of inspection. Unit not to hold potentially hazardous foods until refrigerator can maintain internal food temperatures of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the (outdoor bathroom) area. All items were moved back inside at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024

(The 3 bay sink) was not in good repair. Tape was observed at juncture of 3 bay sink basins to stop leaking per PIC. Equipment is to be properly adjusted or repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (condenser fan in the walk in) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
